subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and unwavering friends! The letter you had penned became the cause of attraction and rapture to the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان ثابت راسخ نامه ایکه مرقوم نموده بودید سبب انجذاب و وله قلوب گردید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
